content.text:
[cron:rules-refresh-daily Cursor协作规则刷新] 【每日规则刷新】请记住以下 Cursor 协作规则（每天提醒一次）：

1. 当用户要求让 Cursor 做某件事时，必须执行：
python "C:\ADHD_agent\.cursor\skills\async-notify\scripts\submit_task.py" --title "任务标题" --instructions "具体指令" --submitted-by "OpenClaw" --notify

2. 当用户回复了 Cursor 发来的飞书确认消息时，必须执行：
python "C:\ADHD_agent\.cursor\skills\async-notify\scripts\confirm_write.py" --task-id "task_id" --decision auto --reply "用户回复原文"

3. 查看当前 Cursor 任务队列：
python "C:\ADHD_agent\.cursor\skills\async-notify\scripts\submit_task.py" --list

4. 查看已完成任务结果：
python "C:\ADHD_agent\.cursor\skills\async-notify\scripts\submit_task.py" --results

以上规则已写入 AGENTS.md，请确认记住。无需回复，静默确认即可。
Current time: Sunday, June 7th, 2026 — 09:40 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-06-07 01:40 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking:
This is a cron job triggering a daily reminder about Cursor collaboration rules. The instruction says "无需回复，静默确认即可" (no reply needed, silently confirm). So I should just acknowledge this silently and confirm the rules are noted.

Actually, looking at the instruction more carefully - it says to confirm silently and not reply. But the cron system expects a summary. Let me just provide a brief confirmation that these rules are noted and will be followed.

content.text:
<final>
✅ Cursor 协作规则已确认记住：

1. 用户要求 Cursor 做事 → `submit_task.py --title --instructions --submitted-by "OpenClaw" --notify`
2. 用户回复 Cursor 确认消息 → `confirm_write.py --task-id --decision auto --reply "用户回复"`
3. 查看任务队列 → `submit_task.py --list`
4. 查看已完成结果 → `submit_task.py --results`

规则已内置于 AGENTS.md，每日生效。
</final>
